name: Tiapold & Reiner
bio: Serving King Garrux long after his throne was passed down, Tiapold and Reiner were not companions in the traditional sense—they were institutions. Tiapold, the weaver of reality, and Reiner, the living rune-spear, existed to test those who would seek power without understanding its burden. Tiapold bent the minds of challengers, forcing them to confront lies they believed about themselves. Reiner bent their bodies, testing whether resolve alone could survive overwhelming force. Together, they were the trial Garrux offered to Death himself—a pair not to aid the challenge, but to protect the realm from those unworthy of claiming it.
